recap:
- AI Playground offers a no-code interface for testing SQL and Python Unity Catalog Functions as Agent Tools.
- It provides automatic UC-permission-level access to various tools and advanced LLMs like Claude and GPT models.
- The platform is designed for prototyping queries, LLMs, and tool usage prior to developing agent code.
- Users can efficiently test and refine their ideas without needing extensive coding knowledge.
- The integration facilitates rapid experimentation and iteration in AI-driven projects.
